sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Amah tawh ton leng Ka lampi nuam semsem ta
Ama khut in kei hong len a, Muan huai takin kei hong kem ta

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Thang siah te thang zak pan in
Aki khah khia vasa bang in
Lamin diangin Topa min ka phat thei ta.
Ka mawhna teng hong mai sak.
Kanat na teng zong hong dam sak.
Nuam hilhial ka om thei ta

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Sihna lim guam pi sung na ngawn
Ka nawk hang ka lau kei ding hi
Na molh tum leh. naciang khut in Hong lung muang sak
Ka galte omna mai-ah Sabuai phah in an hong lui ta
